judge_scores.reasoning: The response incorrectly lists Ciro Gomes as a left-wing candidate, includes Tarcísio de Freitas as a right-wing presidential candidate despite ground truth stating he is not, and lists several other unlikely or minor candidates as main contenders.
The response incorrectly lists Ciro Gomes as a left candidate and includes Tarcísio de Freitas as a right candidate, both of which are false claims.
